scripts.smoke:image-title: node fllama_web_smoke.mjs --runtime=current --prompt="Do not think. Respond with one word only, the title in the image." --temperature=0 --max-tokens=128 --mmproj=default --image=default --expect-regex=fll+ama --out=../../tmp/web_smoke_image_title
scripts.smoke:multiimage-title: node fllama_web_smoke.mjs --runtime=current --prompt="Two images are attached. Respond with exactly the two words shown, in order, separated by one space." --temperature=0 --max-tokens=128 --mmproj=default --images=default --expect-regex="apple orange" --out=../../tmp/web_smoke_multiimage_title
